{{Quote|I can't watch anymore.|Obi-Wan Kenobi, after witnessing Malreaux's death at the hands of his former apprentice|<ref name="Episode III" />}}
'''Whie Malreaux''' was a [[Force-sensitive]] [[human]] [[Gender|male]] [[Jedi]] [[Padawan]] who lived during the [[Republic Era|final years]] of the [[Galactic Republic]]. He was [[Death|killed]] by the [[Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]], who led the Republic siege on the [[Imperial Palace|Jedi Temple]] during [[Operation: Knightfall]] on [[Coruscant]] in the waning [[Standard day|days]] of the [[Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Whie Malreaux<ref name="Force Collection">''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]''</ref> was a member of the [[Jedi Order]] prior to the [[Imperial Era|rise]] of the [[Galactic Empire]]. He lived during the last [[Standard year|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic]], an [[Republic Era|era]] defined by a growing [[Separatist Crisis|secessionist movement]] that culminated in [[the galaxy]]-wide civil war known as the [[Clone Wars]]. By the [[19 BBY|third year]] of the conflict, [[Darth Sidious]]—the [[Dark Lord of the Sith]] publicly known as [[Supreme Chancellor]] Sheev Palpatine—tasked his new [[Sith apprentice|apprentice]], the [[Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]], with leading the [[501st Legion]] in [[Operation: Knightfall]], the siege of the Temple on [[Coruscant]], as part of the implementation of [[Order 66]]. During the invasion, Malreaux fought beside his [[Jedi]] brothers and sisters in defense of the Temple, but was ultimately [[Death|killed]]<ref name="Episode III" /> alongside [[Bene]] and [[Jedi Master]] [[Cin Drallig]]<ref name="SWE">{{SWE|characters|cin-drallig|Cin Drallig}}</ref> in a [[Lightsaber duel|duel]] with Vader.<ref name="Episode III" /> After the fall of the Temple, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]] witnessed the actions of his fallen apprentice, including Malreaux's death, through a [[Hologram|holographic recording]] of the battle.<ref name="SWE" />

==Personality and traits==
Whie Malreaux was a [[human]] [[Gender|male]] who possessed a fair complexion, [[Color|blond]] [[hair]], and blue [[eye]]s. He also wore a [[Padawan braid]], marking his status within the Jedi Order. During the fall of the Jedi Temple, he stood with his fellow Jedi against [[Darth]] Vader, an act which cost Malreaux his life.<ref name="Episode III" />

==Powers and abilities==
As a [[Padawan]] learner, Whie Malreaux was [[Jedi training|trained]] in the Jedi arts in order to hone his [[Force-sensitive|natural talents]] with [[the Force]]. At the [[time]] of Order 66, he wielded a green-colored [[lightsaber]].<ref name="Episode III" />

==Behind the scenes==
Whie Malreaux was portrayed by [[Coinneach Alexander]] in the [[2005]] film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].<ref name="Episode III" /> [[Peter Alexander]], Coinneach's father, the sensei (teacher) of [[Wikipedia:Byron Bay, New South Wales|Byron Bay]] [[Wikipedia:Kendo|Kendo]] Club, appeared with his students as Jedi in the [[First Battle of Geonosis]] arena scene in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="Episode II">{{Film|II}}</ref> Though Malreaux first appeared in [[Sean Stewart]]'s [[2004]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', the character was originally created for ''Revenge of the Sith''.<ref name="SWArchive-Rendezvous with Yoda: Six Questions for Sean Stewart">{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/novel/f20041203/index.html|text=Rendezvous with Yoda: Six Questions for Sean Stewart}}</ref>
